name: Brightlocal
description:
__POSSIBLE_UNTRANSLATED__

What BrightLocal Does

BrightLocal is a Google Maps rank checker built for businesses, agencies, and local SEO professionals. It helps track rankings, manage citations, and monitor reviews—all in one platform. While great for local SEO, it lacks deep technical SEO tools. Best for businesses focused on local search and reputation management.

Source: G2 

Key Features

  • Tracks your Google Business Profile across different cities and zip codes to see exactly where you rank and where you don’t.
  • Audits your citations, business listings, and website SEO to catch errors that could drag your rankings down.
  • Monitors your Google Maps performance alongside competitors to stay one step ahead

Benefits of BrightLocal

  • Helps businesses improve maps rank checker visibility
  • Simplifies review management for better reputation control
  • Syncs business data across Google, Bing, Facebook, and Apple

Pricing

  • Track: $39/month (local ranking and citation audits)
  • Manage: $49/month (listings management, GBP post scheduling)
  • Grow: $59/month (review monitoring and generation)

Pros

  • Strong local SEO and citation management
  • White-label reporting for agencies
  • Easy GBP and review management

Cons

  • No advanced SEO tools beyond local search
  • Some features require add-on payments

‍
